top3.sql:
SELECT AVG(ds.points) AS average_points
FROM driverStandings ds
JOIN races r ON ds.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON ds.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.surname = 'Irvine' 
  AND d.forename = 'Eddie'
  AND r.year = 2000;
